Welcome

A Sanctuary of
Ugandan Warmth

Nestled in Jinja City — Uganda's adventure capital and home to the Source of the Nile — Hotel Zeptan blends contemporary comfort with genuine East African warmth and hospitality.

Family rooms with private bathrooms, balconies, flat-screen TVs, Netflix and free WiFi throughout.

Two on-site restaurants — African, British, American, Indian & more — plus a full cocktail bar.

Airport shuttle available. 2.9 km from Jinja Railway Station, 9 km from Source of the Nile.

24-hour front desk, professional security team, CCTV and a safe welcoming environment.

Book your stay →

Rooms Made for Rest

Each room is appointed with modern finishes, private bathrooms, satellite TV, Netflix and complimentary WiFi — everything you need after a day on the Nile.

Meetings & Events

World-Class Conference Facilities

From intimate boardroom sessions to large-scale conferences — Hotel Zeptan provides fully equipped, professional spaces with projectors, climate control and dedicated support staff.

Grand Conference Hall
U-shape setup · Projector & screen · Up to 80 delegates
Executive Conference Room
Boardroom & classroom layouts · Flip chart · AC

Culinary

Two Restaurants,
World Flavours

From dawn breakfasts to cocktail hours, our two restaurants serve the world on a plate — with a distinctly Ugandan soul. Those ring chandeliers set the mood.

Jinja Adventures

The World's Greatest
Adventures Await You

Jinja is Uganda's adventure capital — home to Africa's mightiest river, Class 5 rapids, cliff-top bungees and golden safari sunsets. Hotel Zeptan is your perfect base.

🏆 #1 Experience
Activity 01
White Water Rafting
the River Nile

Class 5 rapids on the mighty Nile — one of the world's premier white-water experiences. Full-day expeditions, all equipment provided.

Full DayAll Levels11 km Away
🌅 Unmissable
Activity 02
Safari &
Sunset Game Drive

Watch the African sun melt into the horizon from a Land Cruiser rooftop. Wildlife, golden light and pure magic.

Half / Full DayGuided
🌊
Nile Rafting — Group
Laughs guaranteed on the rapids
🐎
Horse Riding
Nile valley trails on horseback
🪝
Zip-Lining
Fly over jungle canopy
😄
Rope Swing & Zip
Pure joy over the Nile
🌿
Forest Hiking
Guided nature trails
🏍️

Red dirt tracks through the bush
🪂
Bungee Jumping
44m above Bujagali Falls · 11 km
💧
Source of the Nile
Speke Monument boat tour · 9 km

Our tour desk can arrange all activities, transport & guided experiences — ask at reception.

Ask About Activities
After Dark

Jinja After Dark —
The Night is Alive

When the sun dips below the Nile, Jinja transforms. Our garden bar, outdoor fireplace and terrace come alive — and the city beyond has rooftop bars, live music and dancing till dawn.

The Garden Bar & Terrace

Edison bulbs, tropical plants and warm African evenings — our outdoor bar is where the night begins.

Outdoor Terrace

Open seating under geometric canopy

Location

Perfectly Placed in Jinja City

At the pulse of Jinja — Uganda's adventure capital — Hotel Zeptan puts you close to the Source of the Nile, Bujagali rapids and the vibrant town centre.

Massese Danida II
